summary: Full e2e validation of Technical Sheets (Fichas Tecnicas) module passed. Backend 10/10 pytest cases green (CRUD + duplicate guard + auth + regression on products/tables/orders/stock). Frontend Playwright validated: login, Menu shows technical-sheet-{product_id} buttons, smart routing (Sansao -> existing view, Parmegiana -> /new with pre-filled product+image), create flow with ingredients/steps/notes, view renders all fields, Edit -> PUT persists, Print button present and clickable, Upload button present. No regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: TechnicalSheetsPage list cards lack data-testid (e.g., sheet-card-{id}); add it for future automation, though the page renders correctly with Sansao card visible.

openTechnicalSheet in MenuPage relies on a 404 from /by-product/{id} to branch; this generates an expected 404 console entry on every click for products without a sheet. Consider using a HEAD or a dedicated 'exists' endpoint to avoid noisy logs, or suppress via try/catch network error logging.

TechnicalSheetFormPage hides image_url Input value when it starts with 'data:' (intentional for base64) - works, but the user can't easily switch from uploaded base64 back to a URL without removing first. Minor UX.

Server.py POST /technical-sheets returns 400 when duplicate exists; the menu flow already prevents this via 'by-product' check, but a direct POST collision in the form would surface as toast.error from the detail; acceptable.
seed_data_creation: Test created and cleaned up a sheet for product 'File a Parmegiana' (deleted at end). Pre-existing seeded sheet for 'Sansao - A Forca Bruta' (id ae207739-fad4-4435-ab3f-6f476f0e0542) was used for the read-existing path and left untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tests cover backend CRUD plus regression (products/tables/orders/stock). Frontend Playwright covered: smart-route from Menu, create, view, edit (PUT), print/upload button presence. /api/technical-sheets/by-product/{id} returns 404 when no sheet - expected behaviour the menu relies on. /api/stock endpoint test is tolerant of 200 or 404 in case the route name differs.
